title: Metadata for the paper: Connecting the disconnected: Professional isolation and inclusion of independent workers
author: Maj, Jolanta
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This record provides metadata and supporting documentation related to the article “Connecting the disconnected: Professional isolation and inclusion of independent workers.” It includes documentation associated with the qualitative phase of the study, including the interview guide. The study explored how independent workers experience isolation and inclusion and was conducted using a grounded theory approach. The empirical material included 30 interviews with 27 interviewees, conducted online in English, French, and Polish, as well as observational material collected during the study. The underlying raw data, including interview transcripts, recordings, and observation notes, are not publicly available due to confidentiality obligations and the sensitive nature of the collected material. This record is intended to provide public access to metadata and non-sensitive research documentation related to the published article.  
  Maj, J., Hamza-Orlinska, A., & Santistevan, D. (2025). Connecting the disconnected: Professional isolation and inclusion of independent workers. European Management Review, 1–31. https://doi.org/10.1111/emre.70004
